metadata.description: Marketplace for travel planning and guide redesign plugins.

plugins.name: jhins-trip-planner
plugins.description: End-to-end trip planner covering pre-trip prep, round-trip transport with booking windows, evidence-tiered hotels, weather-aware day-by-day itineraries, route-fit dining with operating-status verification, destination-specific local specialties, categorized budget with overage checks, source-traceable recommendations, and three output modes (advice / guide redesign / page refactor).
